channel.title: Personas on James Wade
channel.description: Recent content in Personas on James Wade

item.title: How to Teach
item.description: Much of my inspiration for this project come from Greg Wilson, founder of the Carpentries. These notes are based on his talks about how to teach tech. The first is a talk he gave in April 2019 for RStudio,1 and the second is an update to that talk from July 2021 on his personal YouTube channel.2 Lesson 1: Design Curriculum for Learning Stages There are three stages of learners: novices, competents, and experts.
